title: scutellaria parvula
intro: Scutellaria parvula, also known as the small skullcap, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Scutellaria parvula include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive disorders, as well as its ability to support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some also using it in salves and creams for topical application.
